calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-23-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: FRANCISCO G. TORRES FOR PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION, WITH FRED DOUGHTY, PROPERTY MANAGER AND EDWARD MORGAN, RESIDENT MANAGER
DEFENDANT IQTIDAR KHAN IN PRO PER

THIS CAUSE CAME ON REGULARLY FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE THIS DAY. ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT AS INDICATED ABOVE. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT WERE READ AS FOLLOWS: THIS IS A STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF SHALL BE ENTITLED TO RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES KNOWN AS 422 VALENCIA STREET, #201, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103. DEFENDANT, HOWEVER, SHALL BE ALLOWED TO REMAIN AT THE PREMISES UNTIL 5:00 PM ON APRIL 15, 2005 PROVIDED THAT DEFENDANT COMPLIES WITH ALL TERMS AND CONDITIONS UNDER THIS SETTLEMNT AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT IS EXPECTED TO ABIDE WITH ALL COURSE OF CONDUCT UNTIL THE PREMISES IS VACATED. DEFENDANT SHALL LEAVE THE PREMISES IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION. IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES, PLAINTIFF SHALL WAIVE ATTORNEYS' FEES AMD COSTS THE SECURITY DEPOSIT IN THE AMOUNT OF $113.00 SHALL BE RETURNED TO DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE A DISMISSAL OF THIS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO VACATE THE PREMISES, PLAINTIFF SHALL BE ENTITLED TO OBTAIN A JUDGMENT, UPON EX PARTE APPLICATION, AWARDING PLAINTIFF POSSESSION, RENT, AND UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $246.00 TOGETHER WITH DAILY DAMAGES AT THE RATE OF $4.10 PER DAY FROM MARCH 1, 2005 UNTIL ENTRY OF JUDGMENT; ATTORNEYS' FEES IN THE SUM OF $1,300.00; COSTS IN THE SUM OF $473.30; AND AWARDING THE SECURITY DEPOSIT TO PLAINTIFF. EACH PARTY SPECIFICALLY WAIVES ANY CLAIM OR CAUSE OF ACTION AGAINST THE OTHER PARTY. TRIAL DATE VACATED.

JPT JASON JUNGREIS, CLERK CLARK BANAYAD, REPORTER CHRISTINA PAXTON (218)
